subtitle: The Active Inference Institute's ongoing year.
audience: Members, collaborators, and visitors who want to follow what the Institute is doing this year.
lede: 2026 is the Institute's ongoing year — a light entry point to the various things happening across the organization. The best places to follow along are the Activities page and the Calendar, where recurring sessions, working groups, and public events appear as they are scheduled. The fuller record is maintained on the 2026 hub.

sections.heading: Following along in 2026
sections.body: Rather than fixing the year's plan in advance, this page points to where the Institute's 2026 activities actually show up as they happen. The Activities page gathers the recurring sessions, working groups, and public events that make up the Institute's ongoing rhythm, and the Calendar is the most reliable way to see what is happening week to week. For how this year follows from the Institute's longer story, see the History page.

sections.heading: Programs carrying the work
sections.body: The year's work runs through the Institute's three program units: EduActive for education, ReInference for research, and the Administrative unit for operations and coordination. The structure page describes how they fit together.

sections.heading: Take part
sections.body: As a participatory, open-science organization, the Institute invites contributors to join the year's work — across learning, research, and operational support. Most participation begins with a single step into an existing activity or group; the get-involved page is the best starting point, and the learning resources offer an on-ramp for anyone new to Active Inference.

sections.heading: Full materials
sections.body: The detailed 2026 record — plans, goals, milestones, and the event calendar — is maintained on the 2026 hub and is being migrated onto this site.

cards.title: Activities
cards.text: The recurring sessions, working groups, and public events that make up the year.

cards.title: Calendar
cards.text: Week-to-week schedule of public sessions and events as the year unfolds.

cards.title: 2026 hub
cards.text: The fuller 2026 record, being migrated in.
